title: Why Do Cats Wear Hats?
poem_text:
Why do cats wear hats on their toes?
Why do dogs bark at their own nose?

Why do trees tap their branchy feet?
Why do clouds eat marshmallow treats?

Why do clocks giggle when they tick?
Why do socks turn into a trick?

Why do books hum when they’re shut tight?
Why do stars wiggle in the night?

Why do pillows float up so high?
Why do dreams zoom past the sky?

Why do you ask so many things?
What if the moon wears diamond rings?
cover_context: A whimsical bedroom at night where cats in tiny hats balance on floating pillows and stars zoom like fireflies through the window.
style_prompt: Children's musical poem, guitar and gentle beatbox, 115 BPM, bouncy and playful, fun energy that channels into rhythm, clear warm vocal, every word easy to understand
